name: Stuffed Squid in Red Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 Coriander Stem With Root, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
---------------------------SAUCE---------------------------
1. In a saucepan, melt 3 tablespoons butter over low heat.
2. Add the tomato sauce and stir to blend.
3. Stir in the water chestnuts, black soy sauce, sugar, and ground black pepper.
4. Bring to a boil, then add one cup of water.
5. Return to a simmer for 5-7 minutes.
6. Preheat oven to 450°F.
7. Stuff the cleaned squid with the pork mixture, ensuring they are puffed and cylindrical.
8. Steam the stuffed squid for 8-10 minutes, or until opaque white.
9. Remove from heat and set aside.
10. Arrange the steamed squid in a single layer in a deep casserole dish.
11. Pour the sauce over the squid and cover.
12. Bake for 30 minutes.
13. Serve with steamed rice.
